title: T-010 — Hold list/read API + v_active_holds view consumer
prompt:
# T-010 — Hold list/read API + v_active_holds view consumer

PRD: 09-QUALITY-PRD.md §8.2 QA-010 list, §9.2 v_active_holds view
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Provide read-side query API (Server functions) `listActiveHolds(filters)` and `getHoldDetail(id)` backed by view v_active_holds (active set) + direct table read (detail) with role-aware redaction (auditor_readonly sees release_signature_hash truncated to first 16 chars).

## Implementation contract
1. Drizzle migration `packages/db/migrations/0104_v_active_holds.sql` creates the view per §9.2 verbatim.
2. `apps/web/src/server/quality/queryHolds.ts` exports listActiveHolds({status?, priority?, reason_code_id?, reference_type?, dateRange?}) returning paginated rows from v_active_holds + age and lp_count.
3. getHoldDetail(id) returns hold + items + linked_ncr_id + linked_inspection_id; truncates signature_hash for non-quality_lead, non-admin callers.

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/0104_v_active_holds.sql [create]
- apps/web/src/server/quality/queryHolds.ts [create]
- apps/web/src/server/quality/__tests__/queryHolds.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given migration 0104 applied, when SELECT FROM v_active_holds runs, then view exists and only returns rows with hold_status IN (open, investigating, escalated)
2. Given listActiveHolds({priority:'critical'}), when called, then it returns only critical-priority holds and includes age (interval) and lp_count (int)
3. Given a hold with release_signature_hash X, when getHoldDetail(id) is called by auditor_readonly, then release_signature_hash is truncated to 16 chars; when called by quality_lead it returns the full 64-char hash
4. Given a hold under tenant A, when getHoldDetail(id) is called under tenant B context, then it returns null (RLS isolation)

pipeline_inputs.description: v_active_holds view + listActiveHolds/getHoldDetail Server functions with role-aware signature redaction.
pipeline_inputs.details: Migration 0104 creates v_active_holds per §9.2 verbatim. Server functions listActiveHolds + getHoldDetail enforce RLS via session org_id setting and redact release_signature_hash for non-quality_lead/admin callers (truncate to 16 chars). Pagination via cursor or offset.
out_of_scope: Do not implement materialized view mv_quality_kpis_daily (out of P1 scope here)
acceptance_criteria: Given migration 0104 applied, when SELECT FROM v_active_holds runs, then the view exists and only returns rows with hold_status IN (open,investigating,escalated)
Given listActiveHolds({priority:'critical'}), when called, then it returns only critical-priority holds and each row carries age (interval) and lp_count (int)

Given a hold with release_signature_hash X, when getHoldDetail(id) is called by auditor_readonly, then release_signature_hash is truncated to 16 chars; when called by quality_lead it returns the full 64-char hash
Given a hold under tenant A, when getHoldDetail(id) is called under tenant B context, then it returns null (RLS isolation)
test_strategy: RED: write apps/web/src/server/quality/__tests__/queryHolds.test.ts asserting view filter, list filter, role redaction, RLS isolation
Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter web test queryHolds'
risk_red_lines: Do not return full signature_hash to auditor_readonly callers (forensic only)
Do not bypass RLS via service role in normal queries
